items.title: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
items.dek: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.
items.body: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South African police chief suspended over $20m health contract
items.dek: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.
items.body: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
items.dek: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.
items.body: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.
